The attack mechanism and impact described in this text are related to the potential risks of unauthorised access to AI systems and data. The traditional approach to identity management, which relies on centralised authorities or intermediaries, can be vulnerable to exploitation by malicious actors. This can lead to unauthorised access to sensitive data, code modification, and potential breaches.

The text discusses the potential of blockchain technology to enhance the security and transparency of Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems. The attack mechanism highlighted is data poisoning, where an unauthorized party alters the training data of an AI model. This can lead to the AI system making incorrect decisions or producing biased results.
